text.title: function-calling-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for function-calling-patterns as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Treating stop_reason == "tool_use" as task completion and returning a partial response.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: tool_use stop_reason means the model wants to call a tool and has not yet produced a final answer. Returning the incomplete assistant message skips all intended tool actions.
